title: pilosella praealta subsp. ingens
intro: Pilosella praealta subsp. ingens is a rare and large-flowered subspecies of the Pilosella praealta plant, which belongs to the dandelion family and is native to the mountainous regions of Europe. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Pilosella praealta subsp. ingens are thought to include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system, although more research is needed to confirm these claims. Pilosella praealta subsp. ingens can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
